Phase-5.NAME: Hardening and Verification
Phase-5.Goal: Close operational and regression risks with explicit test surfaces and runtime evidence expectations.

Steps.step-1: Define module-level verification files and commands.
Steps.step-2: Define critical negative scenarios for email, token, and issuance failures.
Steps.step-3: Define required log markers and operator evidence for the install and request flows.
Steps.step-4: Confirm production-readiness gates before implementation execution.

ExitCriteria.Item: Verification surfaces cover critical flows and failure handling
Residual operational risks are explicitly documented
